title: 1Up Totem
description: Turns the totem of undying into a 1Up from the Super Mario Bros Series.
body:
Need a server for you and your friends? click the image below:

[![](https://cdn.apexminecrafthosting.com/img/theme/apex-hosting-mobile.png)](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=16230)

# 1-Up From Mario Bros
In this pack it changes the totem of undying into the 1-Up Mushroom from the Super Mario Bros Series. This pack has a 2D and 3D verison of it. The 2D verison is from Super Mario World. The 3D version is custom made. This pack will also change the totem of undying sound to the 1-Up sound from Super Mario.
